_comment: Hand-maintained Anthropic API prices. Values here WIN over the live LiteLLM feed, so use this to pin official rates or fix a stale/missing entry. Costs are PER TOKEN in USD (per-million / 1e6). Source of truth: https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/about-claude/pricing . Keys may be a bare model id (claude-opus-4-8) or a family-version (claude-haiku-4-5). Last verified: 2026-06-07.
_fields: input_cost_per_token, output_cost_per_token, cache_read_input_token_cost (cache-read, ~0.1x), cache_creation_input_token_cost (5m write, 1.25x), cache_creation_input_token_cost_above_1hr (1h write, 2.0x)
